data.body:
Closed-children evidence (criterion 1): all 12 work-children are status=closed, each landed via a Gerrit change with Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1:
  - a41f-3153-9292-4e76 = Gerrit 564: closed
  - b55f-639d-b4bd-4222 = Gerrit 565: closed
  - 319a-65a5-9b1d-45b2 = Gerrit 566: closed
  - eba7-4315-0f06-42d4 = Gerrit 567: closed
  - e205-cf65-aea8-42e9 = Gerrit 568(+577 fix): closed
  - 9d81-2afd-5b67-4bf2 = Gerrit 569: closed
  - 6755-689b-72c2-4dac = Gerrit 570: closed
  - f088-ef68-9518-4833 = Gerrit 571: closed
  - 0435-8dce-4e9f-4121 = Gerrit 572(+578 fix): closed
  - e866-0bdb-94e3-41e6 = Gerrit 573: closed
  - 235a-e6c1-e034-4a75 = Gerrit 574: closed
  - b5a4-e065-a252-4bc5 = Gerrit 575: closed
All 12 closed: True. The 13th child (a454, the parked 'idea') was detached to standalone (relates_to kept) per the epic AC 'lower-value work captured as an idea, not shipped'. All 12 changes (564-575) + 2 follow-ups (577,578) MERGED to main.
